title: is seele in the newer evas
display_title: is seele in the newer evas
wikitext:
[]: is seele 'in' the newer evas?             Quote Post by ericm » Tue Jun 07, 2011 7:54 pm Listened to a podcast in which they indicated that seele were monoliths because they put their souls (?) int he newer eva units (harpies). I never thought about this before, and I always figured Rei's soul was simply in control of these..?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 07, 2011 8:39 pm Seele are just hiding behind monoliths because it masks their identities and lets Anno drop a huge 2001 reference into the show and stuff. They still have bodies. There's even a scene in EoE where their monoliths "go out" one by one as the Seele members are getting liquified, and then we see Kiel (Seele 01) melt down. The souls of the MP Evas are unknown and ultimately unimportant. They're operated by Kaworu dummy systems, however.
